document.title: SPECIFICATION FOR APPROVAL (Rechargeable Li-ion Battery Pack)
document.documentType: Approval specification / product specification with appended CB Test Certificate and UL Notice of Completion
document.revisionOrVersion: Rev. 0.1; revision history also lists 1.0 Initial Approval

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval product specification for mPLUS Electronics rechargeable Li-Polymer battery pack MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ with appended IECEE CB and UL authorization evidence.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product approval, battery pack technical specification, safety test criteria, packaging, handling instructions, and certification traceability for IEC/EN 62133-2 and UL Mark requirements.
keyPoints: The pack is identified as model MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, a rechargeable Li-Polymer battery pack configured 3S1P with 11.55V nominal voltage and 3330mAh minimum capacity.
The specification states the pack is manufactured and supplied by mPLUS Electronics Co., Ltd. and contains lithium-ion battery cells, safety devices, and protection circuit units.
The appended CB Test Certificate DK-158201-UL states conformity with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
The appended UL Notice of Completion states confirmed compliance with UL Mark requirements for UL 2054 rechargeable Li-ion battery pack project scope.

evidence.claim: The battery pack configuration is 3S1P with 11.55V and 3330mAh.
The product specification identifies the pack as a rechargeable Li-Polymer battery pack.
mPLUS Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies the pack.
evidence.evidenceText: This product Specification ... covers the requirements for the rechargeable Lithium ion (Polymer) battery pack ... manufactured and supplied by mPLUS Electronics Co.,Ltd.

evidence.claim: The cell used in the pack is manufactured by DONGGUAN VEKEN BATTERY.
The cell type is 396088PU and chemistry is Lithium-Polymer.
The pack nominal voltage is 11.55V and charging voltage is 12.6V.
The CB Test Certificate reference number is DK-158201-UL.
The CB certificate covers product Rechargeable Li-ion Battery, model MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, 3ICP4/60/80.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Rechargeable Li-ion Battery ... Model / Type Ref. MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, 3ICP4/60/80

evidence.claim: The product was tested and found in conformity with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 62133-2:2017, IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021

evidence.claim: The CB certificate was issued by UL Solutions (Demko) and dated 2024-10-02.
evidence.evidenceText: This CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body ... UL Solutions (Demko) ... Date: 2024-10-02

evidence.claim: The product was additionally evaluated to EN 62133-2:2017 and EN 62133-2:2017/A1:2021.
UL Solutions completed an investigation and confirmed compliance with UL Mark requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: We have completed the investigation under the above project and confirmed compliance of your product(s) with UL Mark requirements.

evidence.claim: The UL project scope references UL 2054 for rechargeable Li-ion battery pack MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ.
evidence.evidenceText: Project scope: USR: 4791437314 1.1 [MH48478] [UL 2054] Rechargeable Li-ion Battery Pack, MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, BASIC in Vol.1, Sec.11

reviewFlags.reason: Document date and revision metadata conflict: cover lists Version Rev0.1 and Date 2024.08.21, repeated headers list Rev. 0.1 and Date 2025-08-21, while revision history lists 2025-08-21 Revision 1.0 Initial Approval.
Authority context is mixed: the source combines a supplier approval specification with appended IECEE CB certificate and UL Notice of Completion rather than a single authority-issued document.
The label outline section contains apparent sample or unrelated label text for model MBP-1S1P1150-ISS, which was not treated as the subject product model.
Some OCR/text extraction artifacts are present, including misspellings such as 'Eternal short circuit test' and malformed symbols or line breaks.
